text:
what makes you irreplaceable to someone is how much shame you free them from - NOT what you do for them, but who you allow them to be. 

This is why shame is the true currency of power in interpersonal relationships. 

revelations in my personal life entirely due to a VERY https://t.co/cY6HtEivcI
thread:

reply:
shame is upstream of almost everything. nobody changes for the better until they feel safe enough to let go of it.  
the tragedy is most people wield shame carelessly, like a toddler with a gun, and then wonder why their relationships implode

text:
people say things about love that sound totally contradictory but they are not!

There is the SKILL of love and the *feeling* of love. The first you can work on, the other is there or it isn't. Not having the feeling is not a skill issue. don't tell yourself you can maybe "work

shame is the most contagious + easily weaponized emotion on the planet, it spreads even faster than outrage 
people who master not reacting to it become unshakably powerful (which is why they're so rare)

text: I have 100k followers across platforms and have experienced remarkably few of the negative side effects of Minor Notoriety. This is because i share almost no details of consequences about myself and never will.
thread: I have 100k followers across platforms and have experienced remarkably few of the negative side effects of Minor Notoriety. This is because i share almost no details of consequences about myself and never will.

I would recommend this for any content creator btw. The internet is not a place of self expression. You will stay far more safe and sane not telling people what ur feeling/ all the minor events in your life

Just don’t make it easy for people to *feel* like they know you, however untrue that may actually be 

This is bad for growth but good for mental health
reply:
It’s such a tradeoff though, the creators I actually care about are always the ones I feel like I *know*. 
The safest player wins the least fans, but lives the most peaceful life.
Being a main character is never compatible with being chill.

text: if u have no idea what to do with your life, entrepreneurship/tech twitter is great for inspiration. if you have a strong direction, it will benefit you greatly to get off this app and stop getting distracted by all the other stuff you could be doing instead
thread: if u have no idea what to do with your life, entrepreneurship/tech twitter is great for inspiration. if you have a strong direction, it will benefit you greatly to get off this app and stop getting distracted by all the other stuff you could be doing instead
reply: perfectly put. twitter is an idea fountain but also a confusion machine, gotta know when to drink and when to just dip your toes in and walk away.
